reviews.comment:
Excelente atención ya sea en la área de buffet y playeros,me quedé muy conforme con la atención de los chicos...Baños en excelente estado y limpieza total de la estación.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, both at the buffet and on the beach. I was very pleased with the staff's attention... The restrooms were in excellent condition, and the resort was completely clean.

reviewReply.comment:
Estimado/a Cliente.
Muchas gracias por su comentario positivo, nos alegra saber que pudimos cumplir sus expectativas. Muchas gracias por su visita.

reviews.comment:
Destaco que cada vez que pase por allí la atención del personal es muy buena, baños limpios, completos para el aseo. El servicompras es pequeño pero completo.

(Translated by Google)
I'd like to point out that every time I've been there, the staff has been very helpful, the restrooms are clean and fully equipped. The convenience store is small but well-stocked.

reviews.comment:
Ta gueno ehhh Ta gueno. La gente se queja de que no hay mucha variedad jajaj literalmente estamos en medio de la nada, que pesados
Aguante aca e YPF

(Translated by Google)
It's good, huh? It's good. People complain that there isn't much variety, haha. We're literally in the middle of nowhere. How annoying.
Hang in there, YPF.
